title: Curry Chicken American Fusion
description: A unique blend of American and Indian flavors, this curry chicken dish is a perfect fusion of tastes. Serve with steamed vegetables or rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken breasts and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the canned tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the Greek yogurt. Serve hot over rice or with steamed vegetables.
